_comment: COPR fork package inventory for endegelaende/MateDesktop-EL10
_strategy: Pin to f43 (current stable Fedora, EOL ~Dec 2026) for EL10 compatibility. Use epel10 when available. f43 gets active security/bugfix patches from Fedora maintainers unlike EOL branches.

packages.name: mate-utils
packages.notes: Screenshot, disk usage analyzer, dictionary, log viewer

packages.name: mate-applets
packages.notes: Panel applets (weather, eyes, sticky notes, etc.)

packages.name: libmateweather
packages.notes: MATE weather library (skip77 used distgit type, functionally identical)

packages.name: xorg-x11-server
packages.notes: Core X11 server — critical package, benefits from f43 security patches

packages.name: fusion-icon
packages.notes: Compiz tray icon / window manager switcher

packages.name: libsoup
packages.notes: HTTP client/server library (libsoup2) — benefits from f43 security patches

packages.name: gtk-layer-shell
packages.notes: GTK library for Wayland layer shell protocol

packages.name: gnome-themes-extra
packages.notes: Adwaita GTK2 theme (needed for GTK2 apps)

packages.name: xfce4-dev-tools
packages.notes: Xfce build tools — build dep for xapps

packages.name: dnf5
packages.notes: DNF5 package manager — already has epel10 branch, keep as-is

packages.name: xorg-x11-drv-qxl
packages.notes: QXL virtual GPU driver — skip77 custom patches for EL10. Fork GitLab repo.

packages.name: lightdm
packages.notes: LightDM display manager — skip77 patches for EL10. Fork GitLab repo.

packages.name: mate-settings-daemon
packages.notes: MATE settings daemon — skip77 patches for EL10. Fork GitLab repo.

packages.name: mintmenu
packages.notes: Linux Mint menu for MATE — skip77 EL10 port. Fork GitLab repo.

packages.name: libxklavier
packages.notes: Keyboard layout library — dead upstream, stable

packages.name: libXpresent
packages.notes: X Present extension library — stable, rarely updated

packages.name: mozo
packages.notes: MATE menu editor — follows MATE release cycle

packages.name: beesu
packages.notes: GUI privilege escalation wrapper — dead upstream

packages.name: compiz
packages.notes: Core Compiz compositor — 0.8 branch, occasional updates

packages.name: usermode
packages.notes: User privilege tools (userhelper) — stable, dropped from EL10 base

packages.name: libreport
packages.notes: Crash reporting library (ABRT dep) — occasional bugfix updates

packages.name: libyui
packages.notes: UI abstraction library (DNFDragora dep) — occasional updates

packages.name: t1lib
packages.notes: Type 1 font rasterizer — dead upstream since 2011

packages.name: libglade2
packages.notes: GTK2 UI builder library — deprecated, replaced by GtkBuilder

packages.name: network-manager-applet
packages.notes: NetworkManager tray applet — actively developed, check for updates regularly

packages.name: qadwaitadecorations
packages.notes: Qt Adwaita window decorations — occasional updates

build_order_hints.description: Base libraries with no in-repo dependencies
C++ bindings, X server, MATE foundation
X drivers, MATE core components, LightDM
Compiz stack, extra apps, everything else
